summary: TTS | Navigation options in the top right
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is on the Following Teams page

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the Atlanta Braves
steps.result: THEN the app should say "The [focused_team] is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your follow team. Move left, or down to hear additional teams to follow. There is nothing selectable to the right.”
